---
title: "Threshold Independence: GRM, GPCM, and Binomial"
format:
  html:
    self-contained: true
    toc: false
execute:
  echo: false
  message: false
  warning: false
---

::: {style="margin-bottom:1.5em"}
[← Back to home](index.html){style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;font-size:0.8em;color:#555;text-decoration:none;padding:4px 10px;border:0.5px solid #ccc;border-radius:4px;font-family:system-ui,-apple-system,sans-serif"}
:::

Switch between models and drag the threshold sliders to compare how much independent control each has over its category boundaries.

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof activeModel = Inputs.radio(["GRM", "GPCM", "Binomial"], {
  label: "Model",
  value: "GRM"
})

viewof bs_raw = Inputs.form({
  b1: Inputs.range([-3, 3], { label: "b₁", step: 0.05, value: -1.5 }),
  b2: Inputs.range([-3, 3], { label: "b₂", step: 0.05, value: -0.5 }),
  b3: Inputs.range([-3, 3], { label: "b₃", step: 0.05, value:  0.5 }),
  b4: Inputs.range([-3, 3], { label: "b₄", step: 0.05, value:  1.5 }),
  a:  Inputs.range([0.25, 3], { label: "a", step: 0.05, value: 1.2 })
})
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
GAP = 0.05

bs = {
  let { b1, b2, b3, b4 } = bs_raw;
  if (activeModel === "GRM") {
    b2 = Math.max(b2, b1 + GAP);
    b3 = Math.max(b3, b2 + GAP);
    b4 = Math.max(b4, b3 + GAP);
  }
  return [b1, b2, b3, b4];
}

a_val = bs_raw.a

function logis(x) { return 1 / (1 + Math.exp(-x)); }

function bc(n, k) {
  if (k > n) return 0;
  let r = 1;
  for (let i = 0; i < k; i++) r = r * (n - i) / (i + 1);
  return r;
}

K2 = 5
TH = Array.from({ length: 201 }, (_, i) => -4 + i * 8 / 200)
COLORS = ["#2166ac", "#1b7837", "#d6604d", "#762a83", "#e6550d"]

function grmCRF(th, a, b) {
  const bounds = [1, ...b.map(bk => logis(a * (th - bk))), 0];
  return Array.from({ length: K2 }, (_, k) => bounds[k] - bounds[k + 1]);
}

function gpcmCRF(th, a, b) {
  let terms = [1], denom = 1;
  for (let k = 0; k < K2 - 1; k++) {
    let cum = 0;
    for (let j = 0; j <= k; j++) cum += a * (th - b[j]);
    const e = Math.exp(cum);
    terms.push(e);
    denom += e;
  }
  return terms.map(t => t / denom);
}

function binomCRF(th, a, b) {
  const p = logis(a * (th - b[0]));
  return Array.from({ length: K2 }, (_, k) => bc(K2 - 1, k) * Math.pow(p, k) * Math.pow(1 - p, K2 - 1 - k));
}

function getCRF(th, a, b) {
  if (activeModel === "GRM")  return grmCRF(th, a, b);
  if (activeModel === "GPCM") return gpcmCRF(th, a, b);
  return binomCRF(th, a, b);
}

function getBound(th, ki, a, b) {
  if (activeModel === "GRM")  return logis(a * (th - b[ki]));
  if (activeModel === "GPCM") {
    const ps = gpcmCRF(th, a, b);
    return ps.slice(ki + 1).reduce((s, p) => s + p, 0);
  }
  const p = logis(a * (th - b[0]));
  let s = 0;
  for (let j = ki + 1; j < K2; j++) s += bc(K2 - 1, j) * Math.pow(p, j) * Math.pow(1 - p, K2 - 1 - j);
  return s;
}

gridData2 = TH.map(th => {
  const crf = getCRF(th, a_val, bs);
  return {
    th,
    erf: crf.reduce((s, p, k) => s + k * p, 0),
    ...Object.fromEntries(crf.map((p, k) => [`crf${k}`, p])),
    ...Object.fromEntries(Array.from({ length: K2 - 1 }, (_, ki) => [`bound${ki}`, getBound(th, ki, a_val, bs)]))
  };
})

crossings2 = (activeModel !== "Binomial")
  ? bs.map((b, ki) => ({ th: b, prob: 0.5, ki }))
  : []

boundPlot2 = {
  const marks = [
    Plot.ruleY([0.5], { stroke: "#bbb", strokeDasharray: "3,2" }),
    ...Array.from({ length: K2 - 1 }, (_, ki) =>
      Plot.line(gridData2, {
        x: "th", y: `bound${ki}`,
        stroke: COLORS[ki], strokeWidth: 2,
        strokeDasharray: activeModel === "Binomial" && ki > 0 ? "5,3" : null
      })
    ),
    ...(crossings2.length
      ? [Plot.dot(crossings2, {
          x: "th", y: "prob",
          symbol: "times", r: 5, strokeWidth: 2,
          stroke: d => COLORS[d.ki]
        })]
      : [])
  ];
  return Plot.plot({
    width: 320, height: 200, marginLeft: 48,
    x: { label: "θ", tickValues: [-2, -1, 0, 1, 2] },
    y: { label: "P(X ≥ k | θ)", domain: [0, 1] },
    marks
  });
}

crfPlot2 = Plot.plot({
  width: 320, height: 200, marginLeft: 48,
  x: { label: "θ", tickValues: [-2, -1, 0, 1, 2] },
  y: { label: "P(X = k | θ)", domain: [0, 1] },
  marks: Array.from({ length: K2 }, (_, k) =>
    Plot.line(gridData2, { x: "th", y: `crf${k}`, stroke: COLORS[k], strokeWidth: 2 })
  )
})

erfPlot2 = Plot.plot({
  width: 320, height: 200, marginLeft: 48,
  x: { label: "θ", tickValues: [-2, -1, 0, 1, 2] },
  y: { label: "E[X | θ]", domain: [0, K2 - 1] },
  marks: [
    Plot.line(gridData2, { x: "th", y: "erf", stroke: "#333", strokeWidth: 2.5 })
  ]
})
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
caption2 = ({
  "GRM":     "× marks the b_k where each boundary P(X≥k|θ) = 0.5 — the free threshold location. GRM thresholds must stay ordered (b₁ < b₂ < b₃ < b₄); sliders clamp at their neighbours. Slide any b_k to shift only that boundary independently.",
  "GPCM":    "GPCM step difficulties: the b_k where adjacent category probability curves intersect. All four can be moved freely and independently — including past each other (disordered thresholds are allowed under the GPCM).",
  "Binomial":"Only b₁ is free. The other boundary curves (dashed) are fully determined by the binomial CDF given the single location b₁ — they cannot be moved independently regardless of how b₁ is set."
})[activeModel]

html`
<div style="font-family:inherit">
  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:16px;margin-bottom:1rem;align-items:start">
    <div>
      <p style="font-size:0.8em;font-weight:600;color:#555;margin:0 0 4px">Boundary / threshold functions</p>
      ${boundPlot2}
    </div>
    <div>
      <p style="font-size:0.8em;font-weight:600;color:#555;margin:0 0 4px">Category response functions</p>
      ${crfPlot2}
    </div>
    <div>
      <p style="font-size:0.8em;font-weight:600;color:#555;margin:0 0 4px">Expected response function</p>
      ${erfPlot2}
    </div>
  </div>
  <p style="font-size:0.78em;color:#666;margin:0;line-height:1.5">${caption2}</p>
</div>
`
```
